audio_identity.overall_style: NES Action RPG soundtrack by renowned composer Yuzo Koshiro
distinctive_elements: Hidden sound test accessible via Controller 2 (Up + Right + A + B) then Controller 1 (Down + Left + Select)
Five major dungeon sections with noticeably different background music
One unused track (10th track in sound test) with no in-game implementation
influences: Streets of Rage (Yuzo Koshiro's later work)

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Legacy of the Wizard

notes.data_completeness: Limited. Sources document composer credits and sound test existence but provide minimal detail on musical parameters (tempo, key, chord progression, time signature). No SFX characteristic documentation found.
